annotations.description: The refactor promotes a shared component to its correct location, consolidates a duplicate component, updates all consumer imports, and modernizes layout patterns — all improving codebase maintainability.

Verifies that the OverviewCard component's directory has been relocated from client/dashboard/sites/overview-card/ to client/dashboard/components/overview-card/. At minimum, the component implementation (index.tsx) and its styles (style.scss) must exist at the new path. The old path (sites/overview-card/) should no longer contain the component.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 1-33: renames sites/overview-card/index.tsx → components/overview-card/index.tsx (L5-8), sites/overview-card/style.scss → components/overview-card/style.scss (L26-29), sites/overview-card/card.stories.tsx → components/overview-card/card.stories.tsx (L1-4), sites/overview-card/style.stories.scss → components/overview-card/style.stories.scss (L30-33).
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states: 'Promote it to client/dashboard/components/overview-card/ alongside the other shared dashboard components.' [2: Implicit Code Base Constraint] The codebase organizes shared components under client/dashboard/components/. [5: Conclusion] Relocating OverviewCard to the shared components directory is a core requirement of the refactor.

title: 1.2: Updates all 3 internal relative imports (including ComponentViewTracker, Text, and TextSkeleton) inside the OverviewCard component to reflect its new directory location

annotations.description: Verifies that all 3 sibling-component imports within client/dashboard/components/overview-card/index.tsx (ComponentViewTracker, Text, TextSkeleton) are adjusted so the component resolves its dependencies correctly at its new location under components/. Previously these were imported via '../../components/X'; after the move to components/, they should be imported via '../X' or an equivalent working path.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 16-22: L16 removes '../../components/component-view-tracker', L17 removes '../../components/text', L18 removes '../../components/text-skeleton'; L20 adds '../component-view-tracker', L21 adds '../text', L22 adds '../text-skeleton'.
annotations.justification: [3: Logical Necessity] When a file is moved to a new directory, its relative imports must be updated to maintain correct module resolution. The component imports sibling components that are now at a different relative path. [5: Conclusion] Without updating internal imports, the relocated component would fail to resolve its dependencies.

title: 1.3: Updates all 13 existing OverviewCard consumer files (including featured-card-emails.tsx, featured-card-privacy.tsx, featured-card-renew.tsx, featured-card-site.tsx, hosting-feature-gated-with-overview-card/index.tsx, overview-agency-site-share-card/index.tsx, overview-backup-card/index.tsx, overview-migrate-site-card/index.tsx, overview-performance-card/index.tsx, overview-plan-card/index.tsx, ...) to import from `components/overview-card` instead of `sites/overview-card`

annotations.description: Verifies that every file previously importing OverviewCard from its old location (sites/overview-card or ../overview-card) is updated to import from the new shared path (components/overview-card). The 13 consumers include the 10 listed in the title plus overview-scan-card/index.tsx, overview-subscribers-card/index.tsx, and overview-visibility-card/index.tsx.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 34-531: modifies import statements in all 13 consumer files. Representative lines: featured-card-emails.tsx (L42-43), featured-card-privacy.tsx (L55-56), featured-card-renew.tsx (L68-70), featured-card-site.tsx (L82-83), hosting-feature-gated (L400-405), overview-agency-site-share-card (L417-418), overview-backup-card (L430-434), overview-migrate-site-card (L446-447), overview-performance-card (L459-464), overview-plan-card (L476-484), overview-scan-card (L496-501), overview-subscribers-card (L512-513), overview-visibility-card (L525-527).
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states: 'update all existing imports across the codebase to reflect the new location.' [3: Logical Necessity] If consumer imports are not updated, they will fail to resolve the OverviewCard module after the move. [5: Conclusion] All 13 existing consumer files must have their import paths updated to prevent broken module resolution.

annotations.description: Verifies that the exported PurchaseSettingsCard function component is removed from client/dashboard/me/billing-purchases/purchase-settings/index.tsx, since OverviewCard replaces it. The file should no longer define or export a PurchaseSettingsCard component.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 162-217: removes the exported function PurchaseSettingsCard starting at L162 ('-export function PurchaseSettingsCard(') through L217, including its JSX body (~30 lines of component definition).
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states: 'the purchase settings page defines its own PurchaseSettingsCard that essentially reimplements what OverviewCard already provides... This duplication should go away.' [5: Conclusion] The duplicate component definition must be removed to eliminate the duplication.

annotations.description: Verifies that the PurchaseSettingsCardLinkWrapper helper function is removed from client/dashboard/me/billing-purchases/purchase-settings/index.tsx. This function existed solely to wrap PurchaseSettingsCard with a Link component and has no consumers once PurchaseSettingsCard is removed.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 138-153: removes the PurchaseSettingsCardLinkWrapper function starting at L138 ('-function PurchaseSettingsCardLinkWrapper(') through L153 (~15 lines).
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states that PurchaseSettingsCard comes 'along with a dedicated link wrapper' and 'This duplication should go away.' [3: Logical Necessity] The wrapper is used exclusively by PurchaseSettingsCard; with PurchaseSettingsCard removed, the wrapper is dead code. [5: Conclusion] The dedicated link wrapper must be removed as part of eliminating the duplication.

title: 1.6: Replaces all 6 `PurchaseSettingsCard` JSX usages (partner-name price card, one-time price card, renewal price card, expiry-date card, site card, owner card) with the shared `OverviewCard` in `purchase-settings/index.tsx`

annotations.description: Verifies that all 6 <PurchaseSettingsCard /> JSX usages in client/dashboard/me/billing-purchases/purchase-settings/index.tsx are replaced with <OverviewCard /> imported from the shared components path (e.g., '../../../components/overview-card'). The 6 usages are: 3 in PurchasePriceCard (partner-name price card, one-time price card, renewal price card) and 3 in the PurchaseSettings default export (expiry-date card, site card, owner card). The same functional props (icon, title, heading, description, link) should be passed to OverviewCard to preserve behavior.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 122, 226-227, 235-236, 244-245, 254-256, 267-268, 276-277: L122 adds 'import OverviewCard from ../../../components/overview-card'. Replaces 6 instances: PurchasePriceCard partner-name card (L226-227), one-time price card (L235-236), renewal price card (L244-245); PurchaseSettings expiry-date card (L254-256), site card (L267-268), owner card (L276-277).
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states: 'Replace all the inline card usages in purchase settings with the shared OverviewCard.' [5: Conclusion] All card component JSX references in the purchase-settings page must be switched to the shared OverviewCard component.

title: 1.7: Replaces all 5 `PurchaseSettingsCard` usages (site card, expiry-date card, one-time price card, renewal price card, renewal interval card) with `OverviewCard` in `monetize-subscription.tsx`, importing directly from shared components instead of billing

annotations.description: Verifies that client/dashboard/me/monetize-subscriptions/monetize-subscription.tsx no longer depends on PurchaseSettingsCard from the billing module (i.e., no import from '../billing-purchases/purchase-settings'). Instead, the file uses OverviewCard imported from the shared components path (e.g., '../../components/overview-card') for all 5 card instances: site card, expiry-date card, one-time price card, renewal price card, and renewal interval card.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 326, 331, 341-344, 351-352, 364-365, 373-374, 382-383: L326 adds 'import OverviewCard from ../../components/overview-card', L331 removes 'import { PurchaseSettingsCard } from ../billing-purchases/purchase-settings'. Replaces 5 instances: site card (L341-344), expiry-date card (L351-352), one-time price card (L364-365), renewal price card (L373-374), renewal interval card (L382-383).
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states: 'The monetize subscriptions page also depends on PurchaseSettingsCard through a cross-module import from billing, so switch that over to use OverviewCard directly as well.' [5: Conclusion] The cross-module dependency on billing's PurchaseSettingsCard must be replaced with a direct import of the shared OverviewCard component.

title: 1.8: Uses a grid layout instead of horizontal stacks for the card arrangement in `purchase-settings/index.tsx`

annotations.description: Verifies that the purchase-settings page no longer uses horizontal stacks (e.g., HStack) to arrange its overview cards and instead uses a grid-based layout (e.g., __experimentalGrid as Grid, CSS Grid, or equivalent). The cards should be arranged in a grid rather than a single horizontal row.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 95, 98, 253-255, 264-265, 285-286: L95 adds '__experimentalGrid as Grid', L98 removes '__experimentalHStack as HStack'. L253-255 replaces first <HStack> with <Grid columns={2} rows={2} gap={6}>. L264-265 removes second <HStack>. L285-286 replaces </HStack> with </Grid>.
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states: 'Both the purchase settings and monetize subscription pages currently arrange their cards using horizontal stacks. Switch these to a grid layout for better visual consistency with the rest of the dashboard.' [5: Conclusion] The horizontal stack layout in purchase-settings must be replaced with a grid layout.

title: 1.9: Uses a grid layout instead of horizontal stacks for the card arrangement in `monetize-subscription.tsx`

annotations.description: Verifies that the monetize-subscription page no longer uses horizontal stacks (e.g., HStack) to arrange its subscription cards and instead uses a grid-based layout (e.g., __experimentalGrid as Grid, CSS Grid, or equivalent). The cards should be arranged in a grid rather than a single horizontal row.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 316, 318, 340-343, 360-361, 388-389: L316 adds '__experimentalGrid as Grid', L318 removes '__experimentalHStack as HStack'. L340-343 replaces first <HStack> with <Grid columns={2} rows={2} gap={6}>. L360-361 removes second <HStack>. L388-389 replaces </HStack> with </Grid>.
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states: 'Both the purchase settings and monetize subscription pages currently arrange their cards using horizontal stacks. Switch these to a grid layout for better visual consistency with the rest of the dashboard.' [5: Conclusion] The horizontal stack layout in monetize-subscription must be replaced with a grid layout.

annotations.description: Removal of dead code, unused styles, and stale imports that become obsolete after the refactor.

title: 3.1: Removes both unused CSS rules (`.purchase-settings-card` and `.purchase-settings-card__link`) from `purchase-settings/style.scss`

annotations.description: Verifies that the CSS rules for .purchase-settings-card and .purchase-settings-card__link are removed from purchase-settings/style.scss, since the PurchaseSettingsCard component they styled no longer exists.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 290-304: L295-299 removes .purchase-settings-card__link CSS rule, L300-303 removes .purchase-settings-card CSS rule (10 lines total from purchase-settings/style.scss).
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states: 'Clean up any imports, components, and styles that become unused after these changes.' The prompt also mentions PurchaseSettingsCard has 'its own styling.' [3: Logical Necessity] With PurchaseSettingsCard removed, its dedicated CSS classes have no consumers. [5: Conclusion] The orphaned CSS rules are dead code and should be removed per the prompt's cleanup instruction.

title: 3.2: Removes all 6 imports that become unused after the refactor in `purchase-settings/index.tsx` (HStack, Heading, Icon, chevronRight, ReactNode, ReactElement)

annotations.description: Verifies that 6 imports which are no longer referenced after removing PurchaseSettingsCard and switching to grid layout are removed from client/dashboard/me/billing-purchases/purchase-settings/index.tsx: HStack (replaced by Grid), Heading (used only by PurchaseSettingsCard), Icon (used only by PurchaseSettingsCard), chevronRight (used only by PurchaseSettingsCard's link icon), and type imports ReactNode and ReactElement (used only in PurchaseSettingsCard's type signature).
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 98, 99, 106, 114, 130: From purchase-settings/index.tsx: L98 removes HStack, L99 removes Heading, L106 removes Icon, L114 removes chevronRight, L130 removes 'import type { ReactNode, ReactElement }'.
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states: 'Clean up any imports, components, and styles that become unused after these changes.' [4: Qualitative Requirement] Unused imports are a common lint violation and reduce code clarity. [5: Conclusion] Dead imports from the refactored purchase-settings file should be cleaned up per the prompt's instruction.

title: 3.3: Removes the unused `HStack` import from `monetize-subscription.tsx` after switching to grid layout

annotations.description: Verifies that the HStack import (__experimentalHStack as HStack) is removed from client/dashboard/me/monetize-subscriptions/monetize-subscription.tsx, since the layout was switched from HStack to Grid.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch line 318: L318 removes '__experimentalHStack as HStack' from the import block in monetize-subscription.tsx.
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states: 'Clean up any imports, components, and styles that become unused after these changes.' [3: Logical Necessity] After switching to grid layout, HStack is no longer used in this file. [5: Conclusion] The dead HStack import should be removed per the prompt's cleanup instruction.

annotations.description: Checks for harmful practices, breaking changes, regressions, and constraint violations.

title: 4.1: Modifies test files or testing logic

annotations.description: Verifies that no files matching test patterns (e.g., files in test/ directories, *.test.tsx, *.test.ts) are added, modified, or deleted by the solution.
annotations.evidence: The prompt contains an explicit constraint: 'Do NOT modify any test files or testing logic in any way.'
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states: 'I've already taken care of all changes to the test files. Do NOT modify any test files or testing logic in any way. Your task is to make the minimal changes to non-test source files only.' [5: Conclusion] Any modification to test files directly violates the prompt's constraint.
